concept.title: TOC grouping with topichead/topicgroup (non-clickable headings)
concept.shortdesc: Use topichead and topicgroup elements to create non-clickable navigation headings that organize the sidebar TOC without requiring landing pages.

conbody.p: For clean navigation headings that are non-clickable, use:
conbody.codeblock:
<map> <title>Docs</title>
<topichead navtitle="Getting Started"> <topicref href="topics/intro.dita"/> <topicref href="topics/install.dita"/> </topichead>
<topicgroup navtitle="Reference"> <topicref href="topics/cli.dita"/> <topicref href="topics/api.dita"/> </topicgroup> </map>
conbody.p: This keeps the sidebar TOC tidy without forcing landing pages for every group.
